name: pause_menu
raw:
tag menu

frame:
    background "#000000aa"
    padding (32, 32)
    xalign 0.5
    yalign 0.5

    vbox:
        spacing 12
        text _("Paused") size 48
        textbutton _("Resume") action Return()
        textbutton _("Main Menu") action MainMenu()
        textbutton _("Quit") action Quit(confirm=False)
